title: zanthoxylum rigidum subsp. hasslerianum
intro: Zanthoxylum rigidum subsp. hasslerianum is a subspecies of plant, specifically a type of shrub or small tree belonging to the Rutaceae family, native to Paraguay and Argentina. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum rigidum subsp. hasslerianum include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and pain management, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of illness.
